_comment: Cowork ↔ Claude Code handover file. Both tools read and write this. See HANDOVER-PROTOCOL.md for rules.

CHI-5.title: Core Scaffolding
CHI-5.notes: All 5 tasks complete (CHI-8, CHI-9, CHI-10, CHI-11, CHI-12). Epic ready to close.

CHI-7.title: Basic UI
CHI-7.notes: All 9 tasks complete (CHI-17,18,19,20,21,22,23,24,26). Epic complete. Phase 1 Foundation done.

CHI-8.title: Scaffold Tauri v2 project with Rust backend
CHI-8.notes: Tauri v2 scaffold complete. cargo tauri dev launches window. Min window 1024x640 set. Capabilities directory configured. Vite dev server on port 1420. Bridge code preserved. All 43 tests pass. Git repo initialized.

CHI-9.title: Configure SolidJS 2.x + TailwindCSS v4 frontend
CHI-9.notes: SolidJS 1.9.11 + TailwindCSS 4.2.0 configured. All SPEC-002 tokens in src/styles/tokens.css via @theme. Prettier + ESLint per GUIDE-001. TypeScript strict with @/ path aliases. IPC type stubs in src/lib/types.ts. vite build produces 10.56 KB CSS + 6.99 KB JS. All checks pass (typecheck, lint, format).

CHI-10.title: Set up CI/CD pipeline
CHI-10.notes: GitHub Actions CI with matrix builds: frontend (typecheck, lint, format) on ubuntu, Rust (test on 3 OSes, fmt + clippy on ubuntu), Tauri build on all 3 platforms. All clippy warnings fixed across bridge and db modules. All checks pass locally.

CHI-11.title: Implement SQLite database layer with migration system
CHI-11.notes: SQLite at ~/.chiefwiggum/db/chiefwiggum.sqlite. WAL mode + foreign keys. Forward-only migration system with schema_version table. 6 data tables (projects, sessions, messages, agents, cost_events, budgets) + indexes. Typed query functions in db/queries.rs. 12 unit tests (5 migration + 7 query). Database initializes on app startup. 55 total tests pass.

CHI-12.title: Create CLAUDE.md agent auto-briefing file
CHI-12.notes: CLAUDE.md created with full project context. Handover system established.

CHI-13.title: Implement PTY process spawning for Claude Code CLI
CHI-13.notes: CliBridge with PTY via portable-pty. MockBridge for testing. 5 unit tests.

CHI-14.title: Build structured output parser for CLI responses
CHI-14.notes: StreamParser with chunk-aware JSON parsing. 9 event types. 11 unit tests.

CHI-15.title: Create versioned adapter interface for CLI format changes
CHI-15.notes: AdapterRegistry with version detection and fallback. 7 unit tests.

CHI-16.title: Implement permission request interception from CLI
CHI-16.notes: PermissionManager with async request/resolve, auto-allow rules, timeout auto-deny. 10 unit tests.

CHI-17.title: Build main layout shell (5-zone structure)
CHI-17.notes: 5-zone layout: TitleBar (custom, decorations:false), Sidebar (togglable, width transition), MainContent (view tabs + content), DetailsPanel (togglable, collapsible sections), StatusBar. Keyboard shortcuts: Cmd+B sidebar, Cmd+Shift+B details, Cmd+1-4 views. lucide-solid + @tauri-apps/api added.

CHI-18.title: Implement conversation view with markdown/code rendering
CHI-18.notes: Conversation view with marked + highlight.js for markdown/code rendering. MessageBubble with role labels, model badges, timestamp/cost footer. Auto-scroll with scroll-lock. Empty state + loading indicator. Mock responses for testing. Code blocks with copy buttons.

CHI-19.title: Build message input component with send controls
CHI-19.notes: Auto-expanding textarea (80-300px), Enter to send, Shift+Enter newline, Cmd+Enter force send. Send/Stop buttons with accent/error colors. Character count. Auto-focus on mount. Wired into MainLayout conversation view.

CHI-20.title: Implement model selector (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku)
CHI-20.notes: ModelSelector dropdown in TitleBar center. 3 models (Sonnet, Opus, Haiku) with colored dot badges. Cmd+M cycles models. update_session_model IPC command + DB query. Click-outside close. ARIA attributes. 64 Rust tests pass.

CHI-21.title: Integrate Terminal Mode with xterm.js + WebGL
CHI-21.notes: xterm.js v5 with WebGL addon for GPU rendering, FitAddon for auto-resize, SPEC-002 themed (16 ANSI colors). Cmd+backtick toggles terminal/conversation. Welcome message displayed. PTY connection deferred to IPC commands module.

CHI-22.title: Implement session persistence and sidebar navigation
CHI-22.notes: IPC commands module (8 commands via Tauri managed state). Session CRUD with DB persistence. Sidebar rewritten with real session list, model badges, relative time, delete. ConversationStore rewritten for session support. Auto-title from first message. 64 Rust tests pass.

CHI-23.title: Build permission dialog UI component
CHI-23.notes: Modal permission dialog with risk-level border (green/amber/red), tool-type badges (blue/amber/purple), 60s timeout auto-deny with countdown bar, keyboard shortcuts (Y/N/A/Escape), focus trap. Wired into MainLayout overlay.

CHI-24.title: Configure cross-platform packaging (.dmg, .msi, .AppImage)
CHI-24.notes: Bundle metadata in tauri.conf.json (category, descriptions, copyright, platform configs). Release workflow: tag-triggered, 3-platform matrix (macOS universal, Ubuntu, Windows), tauri-action@v0, draft releases with install instructions.

CHI-25.title: Initialize Git repository and push to GitHub
CHI-25.notes: Repo at github.com/fcostudios/chief-wiggum. Initial commit with 96 files pushed to main.

CHI-26.title: Implement YOLO Mode (auto-approve all permission requests)
CHI-26.notes: YOLO Mode: PermissionManager yolo_mode with auto-approve path + 4 tests (59 total). YoloWarningDialog with mandatory confirmation. TitleBar Zap toggle + pulsing badge. StatusBar 'YOLO MODE' indicator. Cmd+Shift+Y shortcut. Session-scoped, resets on restart.

CHI-28.title: Set up Playwright + Tauri WebDriver infrastructure

CHI-29.title: Layout shell e2e tests (5 components, ~25 cases)

CHI-30.title: Conversation view e2e tests (4 components, ~25 cases)

CHI-31.title: Permission system e2e tests (2 components, ~17 cases)

CHI-32.title: Terminal & model selector e2e tests (2 components, ~14 cases)

CHI-33.title: Integration & keyboard shortcut e2e tests (~17 cases)

CHI-35.title: Project & Folder Management
CHI-35.notes: All 4 tasks complete. Folder picker, project sidebar, CLAUDE.md detection, session-project binding.

CHI-40.title: Folder picker + project creation via native dialog

CHI-41.title: Project sidebar section with recent projects
CHI-41.notes: Full Projects section in Sidebar: header with folder icon button, recent projects list (max 5) with active highlighting and hover states, empty state fallback with 'Open a project folder' CTA.

CHI-42.title: Detect and display CLAUDE.md from project folder

CHI-43.title: Bind sessions to projects with inherited settings

CHI-36.title: CLI Connection & Streaming (CRITICAL)
CHI-36.notes: ALL 6 tasks complete. App now talks to real Claude Code CLI via PTY.

CHI-45.title: IPC commands for CLI (start, send, stop, status)

CHI-46.title: Streaming event loop (bridge output → Tauri events)

CHI-47.title: Replace mock sendMessage with real CLI streaming

CHI-48.title: Detect Claude Code CLI on startup with error UI

CHI-37.title: Permission Flow Live
CHI-37.notes: All 3 tasks complete. Permission IPC, event pipeline, and YOLO mode wired end-to-end.

CHI-50.title: Wire permission IPC commands
CHI-50.notes: Added Validation error variant, respond_permission and toggle_yolo_mode IPC commands, registered PermissionManager as managed state.

CHI-51.title: Build full permission event pipeline
CHI-51.notes: Added permission:request listener in conversationStore, wired PermissionDialog onRespond to invoke('respond_permission') IPC.

CHI-52.title: Wire YOLO mode frontend toggle to backend IPC
CHI-52.notes: Replaced TODO placeholders with invoke('toggle_yolo_mode') calls in enableYoloMode/disableYoloMode.

CHI-38.title: Live Cost Tracking
CHI-38.notes: All 3 tasks complete. Cost accumulator, StatusBar display, per-message cost with K-formatted tokens.

CHI-53.title: Cost accumulator service with SQLite persistence

CHI-54.title: Bind StatusBar + DetailsPanel to live cost events

CHI-55.title: Per-message token/cost display in MessageBubble
CHI-55.notes: K-formatted tokens (1.2K), dollar cost ($0.15), copy button with toast feedback.

CHI-39.title: Session Lifecycle Management
CHI-39.notes: All 5 tasks complete. ProcessStatus tracking, session switching with CLI cleanup, graceful shutdown on delete, crash recovery with retry button, app-quit shutdown.

CHI-56.title: Process lifecycle state machine
CHI-56.notes: ProcessStatus type mirroring Rust enum. StatusBar dynamic indicator with pulsing green (running), yellow (starting/stopping), red (error), gray (ready/done).

CHI-57.title: Handle session switching (suspend/resume)
CHI-57.notes: switchSession() orchestrates: stop old CLI → cleanup listeners → clear state → load messages → setup new listeners. handleNewSession stops old CLI before creating new session.

CHI-58.title: Graceful shutdown on session delete/close
CHI-58.notes: stopSessionCli() exported from conversationStore. handleDeleteSession stops CLI, deletes session, auto-switches to next.

CHI-59.title: Crash recovery with error UI
CHI-59.notes: lastUserMessage tracked in state, retryLastMessage() removes failed user message and resends. Retry button in ConversationView error display.

CHI-60.title: Shutdown all CLI processes on app quit
CHI-60.notes: Added Clone derive to SessionBridgeMap, registered window close event handler that calls shutdown_all() via block_on.

CHI-67.title: Native window controls (macOS traffic lights + Windows buttons)
CHI-67.notes: titleBarStyle overlay + hiddenTitle for native macOS traffic lights. Platform detection via @tauri-apps/plugin-os. macOS: 70px spacer, no custom buttons. Windows/Linux: custom minimize/maximize/close buttons.

CHI-68.title: Titlebar redesign with platform-aware layout
CHI-68.notes: Removed sidebar toggle, added Settings gear for details panel, cleaner layout.

CHI-69.title: macOS vibrancy effects on sidebar and titlebar

CHI-70.title: Custom scrollbar styling for dark theme
CHI-70.notes: 6px scrollbars, transparent track, rgba thumbs. Applied globally via tokens.css.

CHI-71.title: Message enter/exit animations (slide + fade)
CHI-71.notes: fade-in-up keyframe with staggered animation-delay per message. 300ms entrance with ease-out. prefers-reduced-motion compliant.

CHI-73.title: Smooth streaming text rendering (typewriter buffer)
CHI-73.notes: Adaptive character buffer: 3 chars/tick for small buffers, 10 for medium, 25% for large. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

CHI-74.title: Toast notification system
CHI-74.notes: Max 3 visible, 4 variants (success/warning/error/info), auto-dismiss timers, slide animations.

CHI-75.title: Copy feedback animations + hover micro-interactions
CHI-75.notes: SVG icon swap on copy, hover-lift brightness, session border slide, press-feedback scale.

CHI-76.title: Command palette UI (Cmd+K, fuzzy search, categorized actions)

CHI-77.title: Session quick-switcher (Cmd+Shift+P)
CHI-77.notes: Filtered mode on CommandPalette. Model badge dots on session items.

CHI-78.title: Custom context menus (messages, sessions, code blocks)

CHI-80.title: Conversation empty state redesign (sample prompts, personality)
CHI-80.notes: CW branding icon, 'What would you like to work on?' heading, 3 clickable sample prompt cards (Explain codebase, Find bug, Write feature). Cards use sendMessage to populate conversation.

CHI-82.title: Placeholder views for Agents/Diff (informative, not broken)

CHI-84.title: Sidebar collapsed icon-rail mode (48px with tooltips)

CHI-85.title: Session sections (Pinned, Recent, Older)
CHI-85.notes: DB migration v3 (pinned column), collapsible sections, pin toggle button.

CHI-86.title: Session rename inline + session actions menu

CHI-87.title: View tabs with icons + count badges

CHI-89.title: ToolUseBlock component (collapsible, color-coded)
CHI-89.notes: Collapsible ToolUseBlock with color-coded left stripe (file=blue, bash=green, neutral=gray). ToolResultBlock with error state. Structured JSON storage in message content. Legacy markdown fallback parser. tool_use_id extracted from CLI stream for pairing.

CHI-90.title: ThinkingBlock component (muted reasoning display)
CHI-90.notes: ThinkingBlock collapsed by default on restore, expanded during streaming. StreamingThinkingBlock for live display with cursor blink. Thinking now persisted as message with role 'thinking' before assistant message. Preview ~80 chars when collapsed.

CHI-91.title: Permission inline record (approved/denied after dialog)
CHI-91.notes: Inline collapsible blocks with color-coded left stripe (green=allowed, red=denied, amber=yolo). Persisted to DB as role='permission'.

CHI-103.title: HMR Resilience — Event Buffering & Frontend Reconnection
files: src-tauri/src/bridge/manager.rs (SessionRuntime, BufferedEvent, ring buffer, 5 new tests)
src-tauri/src/bridge/event_loop.rs (buffer events alongside Tauri emission, runtime status updates)
CHI-103.notes: Backend survives HMR — only webview reloads. 200-event ring buffer per session with chunk coalescing. Frontend queries active bridges on mount, replays buffered events with deduplication. 84 Rust tests pass.

CHI-104.title: Parallel Sessions — Per-Session State & Non-Destructive Switching
files: src/stores/conversationStore.ts (sessionStatuses Record, getSessionStatus, setSessionStatus, Map<string,UnlistenFn[]>, non-destructive switchSession)
CHI-104.notes: Per-session processStatus via sessionStatuses Record. Per-session event listeners via Map. switchSession no longer kills old CLI. Sidebar shows green pulse (running) and red dot (error) per session. Multiple CLI sessions run simultaneously.

CHI-101.title: Migrate CLI bridge from -p mode to Agent SDK control protocol
CHI-101.notes: Major architecture change: replace -p per-message spawning with bidirectional JSONL control protocol (--input-format stream-json). Enables true interactive permissions (can_use_tool), persistent sessions, runtime model switching, clean interruption. See SPEC-004 §5.6 for full protocol documentation. 5 implementation phases: transport layer, control protocol handler, event loop update, IPC command update, frontend updates.

CHI-102.title: Add granular Bash allowedTools patterns (Developer Mode)
CHI-102.notes: Three-tier permission model: Safe → Developer → YOLO. Developer mode adds 20 Bash(pattern) allowedTools for common dev commands (git, gh, npm, cargo, etc.). TitleBar shows cycling Shield/ShieldCheck/Zap icons. StatusBar shows DEV/YOLO indicators. Cmd+Shift+D keyboard shortcut. 3 new tests (78 total).

CHI-93.title: Structured Log Collector & Diagnostic Export
CHI-93.notes: New epic designed by Cowork. 3-layer tracing (console+file+ring buffer), privacy redaction, ZIP diagnostic bundles, frontend log forwarding, export UI with consent dialog.

CHI-94.title: 3-Layer Tracing Subscriber Setup
CHI-94.notes: 3-layer tracing: console (pretty/compact), rolling file (JSON, daily, platform-aware), ring buffer (36K entries, parking_lot). Log cleanup >30 days. get_ring_buffer() via OnceLock. 6 new tests.

CHI-98.title: Export Diagnostic Bundle UI (Consent Dialog + Menu)

CHI-100.title: GitHub Issue Template with Diagnostic Bundle Guidance

CHI-105.title: Slash Commands & Skill Invocation
CHI-105.notes: Two-phase architecture: Phase A (file scanning) works now, Phase B (SDK discovery) activates after CHI-101. Reuses CommandPalette fuzzy search logic.

CHI-106.title: Command Discovery Backend (File Scanning + IPC)
CHI-106.notes: 11 built-in commands, project + user .md scanning, YAML frontmatter parsing, override priority (project>user>builtin), list_slash_commands + refresh_slash_commands IPC. 13 new tests.

CHI-109.title: Parallel Sessions v2 — Split Panes & Resource Management
CHI-109.notes: Builds on CHI-104's per-session state. Adds visual split panes, resource limits, aggregate cost, and activity notifications.

critical_path: All P0/P1 Phase 2 work complete. CHI-35/36/37/38/39 all DONE. HMR resilience (CHI-103) and parallel sessions v1 (CHI-104) DONE. Most UX polish done. KEY UPCOMING: CHI-101 (Agent SDK — critical enabler for CHI-105/CHI-108/CHI-109), CHI-105 (Slash Commands — CHI-106 can start now, CHI-108 needs CHI-101), CHI-109 (Parallel Sessions v2 — needs CHI-104 done ✓, CHI-110/111 can start now), CHI-93 (Logging epic — 7 tasks). Remaining UX: CHI-61 (CHI-69 vibrancy), CHI-63 (CHI-78/79), CHI-64 (CHI-81/82/83), CHI-65 (CHI-86/87/88), CHI-66 (CHI-92 diff preview).
ux_quick_wins: Remaining UX: CHI-69 (vibrancy), CHI-78 (context menus), CHI-82 (placeholder views), CHI-86 (session rename), CHI-87 (view tabs)

SPEC-002.changes: Added tool use colors (§3.5), toast colors (§3.6), 7 new component specs (§10.11-10.17: ToolUseBlock, ThinkingBlock, Toast, CommandPalette, ProjectSelector, StreamingBubble, Scrollbar)

SPEC-003.changes: v2.0: Added 6 Phase 2 interaction flows (§4.7-4.12). v2.1: Added §4.13 Slash Command Interaction Flow, §4.14 Split Pane Layout Flow, §10.7 Slash Commands spec (CHI-105/106/107/108), §10.8 Split Pane & Parallel Sessions v2 spec (CHI-109/110/111/112/113)

SPEC-004.changes: v2.0: Phase 2 IPC contracts, data flows, types. v2.1: Agent SDK protocol §5.6. v2.2: Added slash/ module to monorepo structure, SlashCommandMenu.tsx + SplitConversationView.tsx to frontend, slashStore.ts + viewStore.ts, §4.4.7 Slash Command IPC, §4.4.8 Split Pane IPC, §5.7 Slash Command Discovery Flow, §5.8 Split Pane Flow, SlashCommand + ViewState types

TASKS-002.changes: Full Phase 2 task breakdown: 5 core epics (21 tasks) + 6 UX polish epics (26 tasks), spec references on every task, dependency graph, gate criteria

spec_updates.notes: All 21 remaining Phase 2 Linear issues updated with spec references and detailed acceptance criteria

2026-02-22_session.description: CLI session ID tracking, event persistence pipeline, critical bug fixes for session restore

changes.task: Persist tool use, thinking & permission events
files_modified: src/stores/conversationStore.ts (tool:use, tool:result, message:thinking listeners + DB persistence)

changes.task: BUG FIX: Session restore missing assistant messages
changes.root_cause: Two bugs: (1) Race condition — event listeners set up AFTER send_to_cli, missing fast CLI events. (2) cost_cents type mismatch — f64 from backend failed i64 deserialization in save_message IPC, silently dropping all assistant message saves.
fix: Added Math.round() on cost_cents before save_message invocation
Added cli:exited safety net to save accumulated streamingContent
Upgraded error logging from devWarn to console.error for persistence failures

2026-02-22_session.tests: 74 Rust tests pass (3 new parser tests). Frontend compiles clean.
2026-02-22_session.verified: DB confirmed: assistant messages with content (382-1493 chars), token counts, and integer cost_cents now persist correctly. Session restore loads full conversation history.

2026-02-22_mcp_permission_fix.description: Fix WebSearch and MCP tools not working in non-interactive -p CLI mode

changes.notes: macOS GUI apps (launchd) don't inherit shell PATH. fix-path-env crate reads shell config and applies full PATH.

In -p mode CLI auto-denies all permissions. Added --allowedTools for safe built-in tools (WebSearch, WebFetch, Read, Glob, Grep, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit, Task, TodoRead, TodoWrite). Bash excluded (requires YOLO). YOLO mode uses --dangerously-skip-permissions.

changes.task: MCP server prefix caching (workaround for broken mcp__* wildcard)
files_modified: src-tauri/src/bridge/event_loop.rs (normalize server names, populate cache from init event)
changes.notes: mcp__* wildcard broken (GitHub #13077, #14730). Per docs, mcp__servername (no wildcard) matches all tools. Discovery: parse mcp_servers from CLI system:init event, normalize (: . / → _), cache as mcp__<prefix>. First message has no MCP; subsequent messages have all MCP tools authorized.

2026-02-22_mcp_permission_fix.tests: 75 Rust tests pass (1 new parser test for MCP server extraction). Frontend compiles clean.
2026-02-22_mcp_permission_fix.verified: User confirmed: WebSearch works on first message. MCP tools (Context7, Linear, etc.) work on follow-up messages.

notes: Phase 1: Foundation COMPLETE. Phase 2: All 5 core epics DONE (CHI-35/36/37/38/39). HMR resilience (CHI-103) and parallel sessions v1 (CHI-104) DONE. UX polish nearly complete: CHI-61 (3/4), CHI-62 (5/5 DONE), CHI-63 (2/4), CHI-64 (1/4), CHI-65 (2/5), CHI-66 (3/4). Developer Mode (CHI-102) DONE. CHI-94 (3-layer tracing) DONE. CHI-106 (slash command discovery) DONE. 103 Rust tests pass. DB schema v3.

environment.notes: Full toolchain ready. 103 Rust tests pass (12 SessionBridgeMap + 4 parser + 1 pinned + 6 logging + 13 slash). Frontend checks all pass. CI + release workflows on GitHub Actions. DB schema v3 (cli_session_id + pinned columns). fix-path-env for macOS GUI PATH. Session lifecycle fully wired (switch/delete/retry/shutdown). HMR resilience: SessionRuntime event buffer + reconnection protocol. Parallel sessions: per-session status + listeners + non-destructive switching. 3-layer tracing: console + file + ring buffer. Slash command discovery: built-in + project + user.
